_meta.description: Structured feature registry — the cognitive anchor for AI dev agents. Read this file at the start of every session to understand what exists, what works, and what remains.
_meta.instructions: Do NOT remove or edit existing feature entries. Only update the 'passes' field after end-to-end verification. Add new entries when new features are built.

categories.control-plane: API layer (Hono + Supabase on CF Workers)
categories.runtime: Edge agent execution (Durable Objects + Agents SDK)

features.description: JWT authentication with token creation and verification
Clerk OAuth2 integration with JWKS verification
API key authentication with hash-based lookup and scope enforcement
Role-based access control with 50+ scopes, role hierarchy (owner > admin > member > viewer), and requireScope() guard
Row-level security via Supabase with org_id context injection on every query
Agent CRUD: create, read, update, delete, list, import/export, create-from-description
Graph structural validation: node IDs, edges, cycle detection
Graph design-time linting: background node placement, idempotency keys, async fan-in warnings, skill state contracts
Auto-correct common graph issues with suggested fixes
Eval readiness gates: latest eval pass-rate check + rollout recommendation (hold vs promote)
Release channels (draft -> staging -> production) with canary splits and traffic weighting
Multi-agent DAG workflows with approval gates, topological sort, deadline enforcement
Eval runs, datasets (R2 storage), evaluators, trial tracking with pass/fail scoring
Evolution proposals and ledger for agent self-improvement tracking
Session listing, stats/summary, turns, traces, feedback submission, cleanup
Cost ledger, daily cost summaries, traces, meta-control-plane annotations
Security scanning, OWASP probes, AIVSS risk scoring, PII detection, prompt injection detection
LLM-based agent config generation from natural language description with tool recommendations
Memory and RAG management routes for knowledge bases
Governance policy templates for agent behavior enforcement
Safety guardrails configuration and enforcement
External integration connectors (Pipedream MCP for 3K+ apps)
Agent-to-Agent protocol (Google A2A) for inter-agent communication
Codemode snippet management routes for custom code execution
Deterministic graph executor: bootstrap -> turn_budget -> summarize -> route_llm -> tools -> loop_detect -> after_tools
Full session lifecycle: edgeRun (fresh), edgeResume (checkpoint), edgeBatch (parallel)
Checkpoint creation at approval gates, full state serialization, cross-session resume with trace lineage
4-tier memory: working (DO RAM, 100 items LRU), episodic (Supabase), semantic (Vectorize 768-dim), procedural (success-scored)
Tool execution with circuit breaker (5-failure threshold, 30s cooldown), parallel/sequential modes
Per-tool cost tracking (flat + per-ms rates) plus infrastructure overhead (DO, Hyperdrive, Queue, Vectorize, R2)
Tool call signature tracking: warn at 3 repeats, hard halt at 5. Prevents infinite loops.
Auto-compress long conversations via LLM-powered summarization when context exceeds threshold
10-scope sandboxed code execution in V8 isolates with capability-based tool ACLs, concurrency limits, recursion guards
WebSocket streaming: real-time tokens, tool_call/tool_result, tool_progress (5s heartbeats), turn_end, done events
Adaptive rate limiter for WebSocket send with backpressure control
R2 file sync for persistent sandbox state: hydrate on session start, snapshot on session end
Plan-based model routing (basic/standard/premium) with complexity classification and category detection
Event telemetry pipeline: runtime events -> Queue -> Supabase otel_events table with time-travel replay
Nested graph support: subgraph registry, input resolution, output mapping
JSON Schema validation for graph node inputs/outputs with TypeScript type generation
LRU cache for validated graphs, expanded subgraphs, and linear paths
Task complexity classification and intent decomposition for multi-agent routing
Pattern-based fact extraction from conversations: preferences, knowledge, goals, behaviors
Cross-session progress persistence: log what was done, what failed, what remains — survives context window boundaries
Standardized agent warm-up protocol: load progress -> read feature list -> verify environment -> orient before executing
KPI dashboard: 8 metrics, agent cards with sparklines, quick actions, system health, cost overview
Agent grid listing with status badges, sessions/7d, success rate, last active timestamp
Agent detail with 10 tabs: Overview, Config, Knowledge, Tools, Playground, Traces, Evolve, Eval, Security, Releases
Agent creation form with model selection, system prompt, tools, governance config
Interactive chat interface for testing agents with real-time responses
Session listing with filters (status, agent name), pagination, stats row (total, avg duration, cost)
Turn-by-turn session trace viewer with step navigation, reflection confidence, DAG nodes, tool call tags
Visual agent builder with XY Flow: agent nodes, MCP server nodes, data source nodes, knowledge nodes, connector nodes
Analytics dashboard: quality scores, sentiment breakdown, trends, tool performance, feedback stats
Global command palette (Cmd+K) for quick navigation and actions
Multi-step agent deployment workflow with success confirmation screen
